/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=13.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mpi_trajectory_features.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_trajectory_features.dir/src/csv_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_trajectory_features.dir/src/trajectory_stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_trajectory_features.dir/src/distributed_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_trajectory_features.dir/src/benchmark.cpp.o -o mpi_trajectory_features  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/open-mpi/5.0.9/lib/libmpi.dylib
